description: User is looking at the 'Sessions to schedule' section on the Explore page.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible with several session cards listed under 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: User scrolls down the Explore page to reveal the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The page content shifts upwards, bringing the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel into view.

description: User pauses to examine the available options in the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The screen remains static on the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel to view more items.
frame_description: The cards within the horizontal carousel shift to the left, revealing a new survey card.
